title: DA comes first - PA, EFF show increase in support in Mossel Bay
description: MOSSEL BAY NEWS - The non-official election...
bodyText:
MOSSEL BAY NEWS - The non-official election results for Mossel Bay's 15 wards show the DA winning, with 65.972%.


> The ANC is second with 14,486% and the Patriotic Alliance (PA) is in third place, with 7.7278%.


Following the PA is the FF Plus (4.823667%), the EFF (2.8716%) and the ACDP (1.7677%).

Mossel Bay's overall voter turnout was 62.6%. At the time of going to press, the Independent Electoral Commission (IEC) was yet to release the official results.

‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’
